import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = toks.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      mut new_result: List<Int> = []
      mut inserted = false
      let m = result.len()
      mut j = 0
      while j < m
        match result.get(j)
        when Some(w)
          if not inserted and v < w
            new_result = list.push(new_result, v)
            inserted = true
          end
          new_result = list.push(new_result, w)
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        new_result = list.push(new_result, v)
      end
      result = new_result
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

let total = sorted.len()
if total == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < total
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
